entries: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage or 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage if used to make a melee attack.

action.name: Pridelord's Roar (Recharge 4-6)
entries: Each nkosi of the pridelord's choice within 30 feet of it that can hear it has advantage on the next attack roll it makes before the start of the pridelord's next turn.

action.name: Rapier
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: The noble adds 2 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the noble must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

action.name: Rapier
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: If the noble is wielding a melee weapon and can see their attacker, they add 2 to their AC against one melee attack that would hit them.

trait.name: Impenetrable Ego
entries: While the noble is conscious and wearing no armor and wielding no shield, it adds its CHA modifier to its AC (included above). In addition, it is resistant to the charmed and frightened conditions.

action.name: Rapier
entries: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 5 (1d8+1) piercing damage.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: The noble adds 2 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the noble must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

monster.name: Noctiny
languages: Common, plus the language spoken by the noctini's fext master

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The noctiny has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Pact Wrath
entries: One of the noctiny's weapons is infused with power. Its attacks with this weapon count as magical, and it adds its Charisma bonus to the weapon's damage (included below).

trait.name: Spellcasting
entries:
the noctiny is a 3rd-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability score is Charisma (save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). It knows the following warlock spells.

cantrips (at will): chill touch, eldritch blast, poison spray

1st level (4 slots): armor of agathys, charm person, hellish rebuke, hex

2nd level (2 slots): crown of madness, misty step

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The noctiny makes two melee attacks.

action.name: Pact Staff
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage or 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage if used in two hands.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries:
the noctiny is a 3rd-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability score is Charisma (save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). It knows the following warlock spells.

cantrips (at will): chill touch, eldritch blast, poison spray

1st level (4 slots): armor of agathys, charm person, hellish rebuke, hex

2nd level (2 slots): crown of madness, misty step

trait.name: Eldritch Weapons
entries: The noctiny's weapon attacks are magical. When the noctiny hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 1d6 force damage (included in the attack).

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The noctiny has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The noctiny makes two Quarterstaff or Eldritch Fury attacks.

action.name: Quarterstaff
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage, or 7 (1d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage if used in two hands, plus 3 (1d6) force damage.

action.name: Eldritch Fury
entries: Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) force damage.

trait.name: Swamp Camouflage
entries: The nodosaurus has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in swampy terrain.

action.name: Tail
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Air Turbulence
entries: A flying creature that enters or starts its turn within 60 feet of the noth-norren must land at the end of its turn or fall. In addition, ranged attack rolls against the noth-norren have disadvantage.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: The noth-norren's weapon attacks are magical.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The noth-norren makes two slam attacks. Alternatively, it uses Throw Debris twice.

action.name: Slam
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (4d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage. A creature struck by the slam attack must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

action.name: Throw Debris
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 60/180 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Fling Victim
entries: One Large or smaller creature caught in the nothnorren's vortex is thrown up to 60 feet in a random direction and knocked prone. If a thrown target strikes a solid surface, the target takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it was thrown. If the target is thrown at another creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw or take the same damage and be knocked prone.

action.name: Vortex (Recharge 5-6)
entries:
The noth-norren pulls nearby creatures into its central vortex to be torn apart by its jagged teeth. Each creature within 5 feet of the noth-norren must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or be pulled into the vortex. A creature in the vortex is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the vortex, and it takes 21 (6d6) slashing damage at the start of each of the noth-norren's turns.

If the noth-norren takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside the vortex, the noth-norren must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or release all creatures caught in its vortex, which fall prone in a space within 10 feet of the noth-norren. If the noth-norren dies, it becomes a pile of teeth, its windy form dissipating, and releases all trapped creatures.

trait.name: Divine Weapons
entries: When it hits with any weapon deals extra 2d8 necrotic or radiant (included below) apostle's choice.

trait.name: Faith's Reward
entries: When it casts the bless spell it gains the benefit of the spell even if it doesn't include itself as a target. In addition when apostle restores hp to another creature it regains hp equal to half that amount.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Three Mace or Divine Bolt attacks. It can replace one attack with use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Mace
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 4 (1d6+1) bludgeoning damage + 9 (2d8) necrotic or radiant (the apostle's choice).

action.name: Divine Bolt
entries: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, 120 ft., one target, 13 (2d8+4) necrotic or radiant (apostle's choice).

action.name: Destroy Undead (2/Day)
entries: Presents its holy symbol and intones a prayer. Each undead within 30' of apostle that can see or hear it: 28 (8d6) radiant (DC 15 Wis half).

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: Wis (DC 15): At will: guidance spare the dying thaumaturgy3/day ea: bless cure wounds (3rd-level) hold person lesser restoration1/day ea: bestow curse daylight freedom of movement mass cure wounds revivify

trait.name: Malleable Physiology
entries: At the start of its turn the atavist gains one of the following benefits until it ends the effect (no action required) or the start of its next turn:Darkvision out to a range of 30 feet.A climbing flying or swimming speed of 30 feet.Advantage on Wis (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.Bony spikes sprout along its skin and a creature that touches the atavist or hits it with melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 4 (1d8) piercing damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Two Keratin Blade or Bone Shard attacks. If both attacks hit one target the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) piercing damage as bits of bone dig deeper into the target.

action.name: Keratin Blade
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 11 (2d6+4) slashing damage.

action.name: Bone Shard
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit 30/120' one target 7 (2d4+2) piercing damage.

trait.name: Phrenic Weapons
entries: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon deals extra 3d6 psychic (included below).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Two Shortswords and one Dagger or three Psychic Blasts. Can replace one attack with Gasp to Survive if available.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 7 (1d6+4) slashing damage + 10 (3d6) psychic.

action.name: Dagger
entries: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit 5 ft. or range 20/60' one target 6 (1d4+4) piercing damage + 10 (3d6) psychic.

action.name: Psychic Blast
entries: Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, 60 ft., one target, 16 (4d6+2) psychic. If target is currently suffocating from breathstealer's Gasp to Survive breathstealer can choose to deal 1 psychic to target instead.

action.name: Gasp to Survive (Recharge 4-6)
entries: Chooses a creature it dealt psychic to within last min. Target: 14 (4d6) psychic and believes it is suffocating including choking and being unable to speak (DC 15 Wis half damage and doesn't believe it is suffocating). At the start of each of suffocating creature's turns it must make a DC 15 Wis save. It has disadvantage on this save if it took psychic since start of its prior turn. If it fails three such saves before succeeding on three such saves it falls unconscious for 1 hr returns to breathing normally and stops making this save. On its third successful save effect ends for the creature.

trait.name: Impenetrable Ego
entries: While it is conscious and wearing no armor and wielding no shield it adds its Cha modifier to its AC (included above) and saves. Advantage on saves vs. being charmed or frightened.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Three Psychic Strikes. If it hits one creature with two Psychic Strikes target: DC 16 Int save or stunned until end of its next turn.

action.name: Psychic Strike
entries: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +8 to hit 5 ft. or range 60' one target 18 (4d6+4) psychic.

action.name: Brain Storm (Recharge 6)
entries: Brutal psychic force wracks foes' psyches. Each creature within 30' of it: 31 (9d6) psychic and poisoned 1 min (DC 16 Int half damage not poisoned). A poisoned creature can re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself.

action.name: Spellcasting (Psionics)
entries: Cha (DC 16) no spell components: At will: detect thoughts mage hand (hand invisible) thaumaturgy3/day ea: charm person suggestion1/day ea: levitate telekinesis

reaction.name: Appeal to the Fervent
entries: When a creature psychophant can see targets it with attack psychophant calls for aid from its followers switching places with friendly creature within 5 ft. of it. Friendly creature becomes target of the attack instead.

trait.name: Aura of Courage and Protection
entries: If conscious friendly creatures within 10 ft. of it immune to frightened and advantage on all saves.

trait.name: Divine Weapons
entries: Its weapon attacks are magical. When commander hits with any weapon weapon deals extra 3d8 necrotic or radiant (included below) commander's choice.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Uses Battle Cry if available. Then three Longswords or two Longswords and uses Spellcasting. If commander hits one creature with two Longswords target: DC 16 Con save or be stunned until end of its next turn.

action.name: Longsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 8 (1d8+4) slashing damage or 9 (1d10+4) slashing damage if used with 2 hands + 13 (3d8) necrotic or radiant (commander's choice).

action.name: Battle Cry (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Commander shouts a frightful and rallying battle cry. Each hostile creature within 30 of it that can hear the cry: DC 16 Wis save or be frightened for 1 min. A frightened creature can re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself. Each friendly creature within 30' of the commander and that can hear the cry has advantage on the next attack roll it makes before start of commander's next turn.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: Cha (DC 16): At will: command protection from evil and good3/day ea: cure wounds (level 3) find steed (as an action)1/day: revivify

reaction.name: Bolster Soldier
entries: When a friendly creature the field commander can see is hit with weapon attack the commander calls out encouragement and creature gains 5 (1d10) temp hp.

trait.name: Armor of Foresight
entries: While it is wearing no armor and wielding no shield its AC includes its Dex and Wis modifiers (included above).

trait.name: Divine Weapons
entries: Its weapon attacks are magical. When it hits with any weapon deals extra 3d8 necrotic or radiant (included below) servant's choice.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Uses its Awe-Inspiring Presence. Then 3 Divine Bursts or 1 Blinding Rod and 2 Divine Bursts. It can replace one attack with Spellcasting.

action.name: Blinding Rod
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 8 (2d6+1) bludgeoning damage + 13 (3d8) necrotic or radiant (the first servant's choice) and target must make DC 17 Con save or be blinded and deafened until end of its next turn.

action.name: Divine Burst
entries: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit 5 ft. or range 120' one target 23 (4d8+5) necrotic or radiant (the first servant's choice).

action.name: Awe-Inspiring Presence
entries: Each creature of servant's choice within 30' of it and aware of it: DC 17 Wis save or unable to use bonus actions or reactions until start of servant's next turn.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: Wis (DC 17): At will: bane protection from evil and good spare the dying thaumaturgy3/day ea: cure wounds (level 5) dispel evil and good divination speak with dead1/day ea: commune (as an action) holy aura resurrection

trait.name: Ritual Cleansing
entries: The fixer can take 10 min to perform a cleansing ritual on a creature object or an area within 30' that is no larger than a 20' cube. For the next 8 hrs the affected creature or object is hidden from divination magic as if it was under the effects of the nondetection spell. In an area that is ritually cleansed divination spells of 4th level or lower don't function and creatures within the area can't be scried.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Two Shortsword or Sling attacks.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage + 3 (1d6) poison.

action.name: Hand Crossbow
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit 30/120' one target 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage + 3 (1d6) poison.

action.name: Cleaner
entries: Can cast the prestidigitation and unseen servant spells at will requiring no material components and using Wis as the spellcasting ability

trait.name: Burning Cold
entries: A creature with resistance to cold doesn't have resistance to the cold dealt by the frost-afflicted. A creature with immunity to cold is unaffected by this trait.

trait.name: Icy Nature
entries: The frost-afflicted is infused with minor elemental power and it requires only half the amount of food and drink that a typical humanoid of its size needs.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Two Frigid Punch or Frost Bolt attacks.

action.name: Frigid Punch
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 4 (1d4+2) bludgeoning damage and 5 (2d4) cold.

action.name: Frost Bolt
entries: Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, 60 ft., one target, 8 (2d4+3) cold.

reaction.name: Frigid Flare
entries: When a creature hits the frost-afflicted with weapon attack ice bursts from the frost-afflicted. Each creature within 5 ft. of the frost-afflicted must make a DC 13 Con save taking 5 (2d4) cold on a failed save or half damage if made.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If subject to effect that allows Dex save for half damage takes no damage on success and only half if it fails.

trait.name: Parasite Sense
entries: Advantage on attacks vs. poisoned creatures.

trait.name: Plant-Powered Mobility
entries: Opportunity attacks made vs. duelist have disadvantage. If the duelist is prone at the start of its turn it can immediately stand with o costing movement.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: One Slam attack and two Shortsword attacks or it makes two Thorn Shot attacks.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 9 (1d6+6) piercing damage.

action.name: Slam
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 15 (2d8+6) bludgeoning damage and target: DC 15 Con save. On failure target takes 14 (4d6) poison and is poisoned 1 min. On success target takes half damage and isn't poisoned. Poisoned target can re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself.

action.name: Thorn Shot
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit 30/120' one target 10 (2d4+5) piercing damage + 7 (2d6) poison.

reaction.name: Spore Cloud
entries: When it takes damage from a ranged attack emits a burst of thick yellow spores that surround infested duelist and heavily obscure area within 5 ft. of it. Spores dissipate at start of duelist's next turn.

trait.name: Knowledge Charm
entries: Carries a minor magical charm gifted to it by the organization. While wearing or carrying the charm infiltrator has proficiency in any two skills and is fluent in any one language (not included above). This proficiency and fluency last until charm is lost or destroyed or until infiltrator performs a 10-minute ritual to change the proficiency and fluency provided by the charm. If infiltrator dies charm becomes nonmagical.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Two Shortsword attacks and one Dagger attack. It can replace one attack with Spellcasting.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage.

action.name: Dagger
entries: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit 5 ft. or range 20/60' one target 4 (1d4+2) piercing damage.

action.name: Light Crossbow
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit 80/320' one target 6 (1d8+2) piercing damage.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: Int (DC 13): At will: mage hand message minor illusion3/day ea: charm person sleep1/day: invisibility

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Uses Fast Talk then three Rapier or Quip attacks. It can replace one attack with use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Rapier
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 7 (1d8+3) piercing damage + 7 (2d6) poison.

action.name: Quip
entries: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, 60 ft., one target, 14 (3d6+4) psychic.

action.name: Fast Talk
entries: The merchant captain baffles a creature it can see within 30' of it with barrage of jargon quick speech and big words. The target must make DC 15 Cha save or have disadvantage on the next Wis save it makes before the end of the merchant captain's next turn.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: Cha (DC 15): At will: comprehend languages mage hand mending3/day ea: calm emotions enthrall heroism1/day ea: confusion freedom of movement

reaction.name: Inspiration (4/Day)
entries: When a creature within 30' of the merchant captain fails an attack roll ability check or save the captain can force it to reroll the die. The target must use the new roll.

monster.name: Npc: Warlock Of The Genie Lord

trait.name: Elemental Weapons
entries: When it hits with any weapon deals extra 3d6 acid cold fire lightning or thunder (included below) warlock's choice.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Two Elemental Burst or Dagger attacks. It can replace one attack with use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Dagger
entries: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit 5 ft. or range 20/60' one target 5 (1d4+3) piercing damage + 10 (3d6) acid cold fire lightning or thunder (warlock's choice).

action.name: Elemental Burst
entries: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit 5 ft. or range 120' one target 14 (3d6+4) acid cold fire lightning or thunder (warlock's choice).

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: Cha (DC 15). At will: levitate water breathing3/day ea: fire shield fly gust of wind1/day ea: conjure minor elementals (as an action) wall of stone

reaction.name: Genie Lord's Favor
entries: When it takes acid cold fire lightning or thunder warlock has advantage on next Elemental Burst attack it makes before end of its next turn provided Elemental Burst deals same damage as damage warlock took.

trait.name: Air Senses
entries: Can't use blindsight underwater or in an area with o air.

trait.name: Air Weapons
entries: When it attacks it conjures a weapon out of the air itself weapon appearing and disappearing in the blink of an eye. Air weapon is a swirl of wind in the shape of a simple or martial weapon but always deals 2d6 damage of the same type as that weapon. Air weapon shaped like a ranged weapon uses the range of that weapon except acolyte doesn't have disadvantage on ranged attack rolls when attacking a target beyond weapon's normal range. Air weapons don't use any other weapon properties of weapons they mimic. Air weapon attacks are magical.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Three Air Weapon attacks. If acolyte hits one creature with two Air Weapon attacks target: DC 15 Str save or be pushed up to 15 ft. away from acolyte.

action.name: Air Weapon
entries: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit 10 ft. or range defined by chosen weapon one target 12 (2d6+5) bludgeoning damage slashing or piercing as defined by chosen weapon.

action.name: Wind's Rebuke (Recharge 6)
entries: Draws breath out of one creature it can see within 60' of it. Target: DC 15 Con save. Fail: all of the breath is drawn from target's lungs and it immediately begins suffocating for 1 min or until it falls unconscious. It can re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself.

reaction.name: Buoying Wind
entries: Summons winds to break the fall of up to 5 falling creatures it can see within 60' of it. A falling creature's rate of descent slows to 60' per round for 1 min. If a falling creature lands before effect ends it takes no falling damage and can land on its feet.

reaction.name: Drift
entries: When a creature moves to within 15 ft. of the wind acolyte the acolyte can fly up to half its flying speed.

trait.name: Magic Evasion
entries: If it is subjected to a spell or magical effect that allows it to make a save to take only half damage it instead takes no damage if it makes the save and only half damage if it fails.

trait.name: Limited Magic Immunity
entries: At the end of its turn any spell or magical effect with duration that is affecting the nullicorn such as hold monster or mage armor immediately ends.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Advantage: spell/magic effect saves.

trait.name: Nullifying Blight
entries: A creature infected with this disease manifests symptoms 1d4 hrs after infection: fatigue light-headedness and blurry vision. When infected creature casts a spell or activates a magic item itchy rash appears and spreads as more magic is used. Until disease is cured when infected creature starts its turn wielding or wearing magic item and each time it casts a spell or activates a magic item it loses 5 (2d4) hp. At end of each long rest infected creature must make a DC 13 Con save. Fail: hp the creature loses each time it uses magic increases by 2 (1d4). A creature that makes 3 saves recovers.

trait.name: Sense Magic
entries: Senses magic within 120' of it at will. This trait otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn't itself magical.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Two Hooves attacks and one Void Horn attack.

action.name: Hooves
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 11 (2d6+4) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Void Horn
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 8 (1d8+4) force and target must make DC 13 Con save or contract the nullifying blight disease (above).

action.name: Ripple of darkness
entries: Each creature within 20' of the nullicorn: 18 (4d8) necrotic and contracts the nullifying blight disease (above; DC 13 Con half and doesn't contract it).

action.name: Stingers
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 1 piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) necrotic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Douse Light
entries: The nyctli magically dispels or douses a single magical or nonmagical light source within 30 feet of it. The nyctli can't dispel light created by a spell of 3rd level or higher.

trait.name: Swarm
entries: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny nyctli. The swarm can't regain hp or gain temporary hp.

trait.name: Innate Spellcasting (1/Day)
entries: The nyctli swarm can innately cast fear, requiring no material components. Its innate spellcasting ability is Charisma.

action.name: Stingers
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the swarm's space. Hit: 21 (6d6) piercing damage, or 10 (3d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hp or fewer. The target must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 42 (12d6) necrotic damage and is blinded for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't blinded. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

action.name: Douse Light
entries: As the nyctli, except the swarm can't dispel light created by a spell of 6th level or higher.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting (1/Day)
headerEntries: The nyctli swarm can innately cast fear, requiring no material components. Its innate spellcasting ability is Charisma.
